About Me

Detail-oriented.
Data-driven.

I'm a MBA Finance graduate with a passion for turning complex datasets into clear, compelling visual stories. My core tools are Power BI, SQL, and Excel — and I love pushing them to their limits.

From building dashboards with 10+ visualisations to writing DAX measures for SLA tracking and KPI analysis, I focus on one thing: making data useful.

Currently based in Bhubaneswar, India and seeking an entry-level Power BI Developer or Data Analyst role.
